sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Inspect current segmentation to understand the state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Look for white pixels and purple shapes
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ('w', 'p', 'M', 'g', 'G'):
        print(f"Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}...")

print("\n--- Adjacency ---")
for pair in seg['adjacency_list']:
    i, j = pair
    ci = next((n['color'] for n in nodes if n['id'] == i), '?')
    cj = next((n['color'] for n in nodes if n['id'] == j), '?')
    if ci in ('w', 'p', 'M', 'g', 'G') or cj in ('w', 'p', 'M', 'g', 'G'):
        print(f"{i}({ci}) - {j}({cj})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
